tooltip.createpolyphony.instrument.hint: Right-click a Tracker Bar to link
Right-click the Tracker Bar again to unlink
tooltip.createpolyphony.instrument.sound: Shift + Right-click to open SoundFont settings
message.createpolyphony.linked: Linked to Tracker Bar - notes for %s will route to your %s
command.createpolyphony.unlink.failed: Your current held item is not a linked instrument.
screen.createpolyphony.soundfont.title: SoundFont Settings
screen.createpolyphony.soundfont.warning: %s, warning: failed to load in this session
createpolyphony.configuration.title: Create: Polyphony Configuration
Maximum simultaneously active synth voices before oldest notes are culled.
createpolyphony.configuration.ringBuffer: Size of the PCM bridge buffer between synth generation and Minecraft audio playback.
createpolyphony.configuration.pumpChunkB: How many PCM bytes are pulled from Gervill per synth pump iteration.
createpolyphony.configuration.adaptiveMi: Lower bound for adaptive stream subchunk size. Higher values are steadier but less responsive.
createpolyphony.configuration.adaptiveMa: Upper bound for adaptive stream subchunk size.
createpolyphony.configuration.adaptiveTa: Target render time budget per adaptive subchunk in nanoseconds.
createpolyphony.configuration.adaptiveEw: Controller smoothing factor (0..1): lower = steadier, higher = more reactive.
createpolyphony.configuration.oneManBand: One Man Band Uses All GM Programs
When enabled, One Man Band plays raw GM programs (including synth lead, organ, etc). When disabled, it is limited to your explicitly supported instrument families.
